## Problem

What user problem does this change solve?

## Approach

Why is this implementation appropriate for LingShu's architecture?

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `swift test`, or documented exactly what could not run.
- [ ] I added or updated tests proportional to the behavioral risk.
- [ ] I verified visible UI changes and attached screenshots when relevant.
- [ ] I updated architecture or user documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not add real credentials, private logs, personal data, or generated build output.
- [ ] I preserved permission, confirmation, redaction, and artifact-verification boundaries.
- [ ] I used protocol/capability-based behavior instead of a one-model exception where possible.

## Test Results

Paste the relevant summary, not secret-bearing raw logs.

## Screenshots

Add before/after images for UI changes.

## Risks

Describe privacy, compatibility, migration, model-provider, or execution risks.
